name: mediaflow-proxy-light
description: High-performance Rust streaming proxy. Plug into MediaFusion as `mediaflow_proxy_url`.

APP__SERVER__HOST.description: Bind host. Must be 0.0.0.0 on Heroku.

APP__SERVER__PORT.description: Bind port. Heroku sets $PORT at runtime; this maps it to the app's expected var.

APP__SERVER__WORKERS.description: Worker threads. Eco/Basic dynos have 1 vCPU — keep this at 1-2.

APP__AUTH__API_PASSWORD.description: Shared secret clients must pass as `api_password=<value>`. Generate with `openssl rand -base64 32`.

APP__LOG_LEVEL.description: tracing-subscriber filter. info for production, debug for diagnosing.

RUST_LOG.description: Overrides APP__LOG_LEVEL when set. Leave empty to use APP__LOG_LEVEL.

APP__HLS__PREBUFFER_SEGMENTS.description: HLS segments to pre-fetch ahead of playback.
